'''鈭歵h-r-p''' ('''tharapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neurotomize|neurotomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neurotomize|neurotomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-r-p
|-
! Lemma
| tharapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tharapithi|tharapithi]] || [[word:tharapiji|tharapiji]] || [[word:tharapishi|tharapishi]] || [[word:tharapi|tharapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tharaputhuth|tharaputhuth]] || [[word:tharapujuj|tharapujuj]] || [[word:tharapushush|tharapushush]] || [[word:tharap|tharap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharaputhu|tharaputhu]] || [[word:tharapuju|tharapuju]] || [[word:tharapushu|tharapushu]] || [[word:tharapu|tharapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapufuth|tharapufuth]] || [[word:tharapufuj|tharapufuj]] || [[word:tharapufush|tharapufush]] || [[word:tharapuf|tharapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tharapethe|tharapethe]] || [[word:tharapeje|tharapeje]] || [[word:tharapeshe|tharapeshe]] || [[word:tharape|tharape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tharapothoth|tharapothoth]] || [[word:tharapojoj|tharapojoj]] || [[word:tharaposhosh|tharaposhosh]] || [[word:tharap|tharap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharapotho|tharapotho]] || [[word:tharapojo|tharapojo]] || [[word:tharaposho|tharaposho]] || [[word:tharapo|tharapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapofoth|tharapofoth]] || [[word:tharapofoj|tharapofoj]] || [[word:tharapofosh|tharapofosh]] || [[word:tharapof|tharapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tharap忙th忙|tharap忙th忙]] || [[word:tharap忙j忙|tharap忙j忙]] || [[word:tharap忙sh忙|tharap忙sh忙]] || [[word:tharap忙|tharap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tharapathath|tharapathath]] || [[word:tharapajaj|tharapajaj]] || [[word:tharapashash|tharapashash]] || [[word:tharap|tharap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharapatha|tharapatha]] || [[word:tharapaja|tharapaja]] || [[word:tharapasha|tharapasha]] || [[word:tharapa|tharapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapafath|tharapafath]] || [[word:tharapafaj|tharapafaj]] || [[word:tharapafash|tharapafash]] || [[word:tharapaf|tharapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tharapasha|tharapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotharapasha|gotharapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitharapasha|gokitharapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tharapn眉sha|tharapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotharapnkn眉sha|gotharapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitharapn眉sha|gokitharapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tharapsh毛sha|tharapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotharapnksh毛sha|gotharapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitharapsh毛sha|gokitharapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tharaprosha|tharaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotharapnkrosha|gotharapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitharaprosha|gokitharaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tharapmusha|tharapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotharapnkmusha|gotharapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitharapmusha|gokitharapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tharapsherasha|tharapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotharapnksherasha|gotharapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitharapsherasha|gokitharapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tharapngasha|tharapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotharapnkngasha|gotharapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitharapngasha|gokitharapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tharapyasha|tharapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotharapnkyasha|gotharapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitharapyasha|gokitharapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tharapyamasha|tharapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotharapnkyamasha|gotharapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitharapyamasha|gokitharapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tharapn眉sh毛sha|tharapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotharapnkn眉sh毛sha|gotharapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitharapn眉sh毛sha|gokitharapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tharapn眉rosha|tharapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotharapnkn眉rosha|gotharapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitharapn眉rosha|gokitharapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tharapn眉musha|tharapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotharapnkn眉musha|gotharapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitharapn眉musha|gokitharapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tharapsh毛n眉sha|tharapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotharapnksh毛n眉sha|gotharapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitharapsh毛n眉sha|gokitharapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tharapsh毛rosha|tharapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotharapnksh毛rosha|gotharapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitharapsh毛rosha|gokitharapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tharapsh毛musha|tharapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotharapnksh毛musha|gotharapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitharapsh毛musha|gokitharapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tharapron眉sha|tharapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotharapnkron眉sha|gotharapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitharapron眉sha|gokitharapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tharaprosh毛sha|tharaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotharapnkrosh毛sha|gotharapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitharaprosh毛sha|gokitharaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tharapromusha|tharapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotharapnkromusha|gotharapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitharapromusha|gokitharapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tharapmun眉sha|tharapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotharapnkmun眉sha|gotharapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitharapmun眉sha|gokitharapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tharapmush毛sha|tharapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotharapnkmush毛sha|gotharapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitharapmush毛sha|gokitharapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tharapmurosha|tharapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotharapnkmurosha|gotharapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitharapmurosha|gokitharapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tharap|tharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙r忙p|th忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotharap|hotharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙r忙p|hoth忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotharap|hohotharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙r忙p|hohoth忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉tharap|n眉tharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙r忙p|n眉th忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉tharap|n眉n眉tharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙r忙p|n眉n眉th忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂tharap|n茂tharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙r忙p|n茂th忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂tharap|n茂n茂tharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙r忙p|n茂n茂th忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutharap|lutharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙r忙p|luth忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutharap|lulutharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙r忙p|luluth忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litharap|litharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙r忙p|lith忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitharap|lilitharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙r忙p|lilith忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotharap|kotharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙r忙p|koth忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotharap|kokotharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙r忙p|kokoth忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketharap|ketharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙r忙p|keth忙r忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketharap|keketharap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙r忙p|keketh忙r忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
